summary: Updated the EditorConfig GitHub Actions workflow checkout ref from `${{github.head_ref}}` to `${{github.ref}}` for a `pull_request_target` workflow. The PR body says the change worked on a linked test run, and the diff shows a one-line CI workflow fix in `.github/workflows/editorconfig.yml`.
what_changed: Changed the checkout `ref` used by the EditorConfig workflow from `${{github.head_ref}}` to `${{github.ref}}`.
Kept the existing workflow structure and comment noting that `pull_request_target` checks out the base branch by default.
The only changed file was `.github/workflows/editorconfig.yml`, with one line added and one line deleted.
smart_moves: Limited the fix to the exact GitHub Actions checkout ref causing the workflow behavior issue.
Used a linked GitHub Actions run as evidence that the new ref expression worked before merging.
Preserved the explanatory comment about `pull_request_target`, keeping the workflow intent visible to future maintainers.
decomp_lessons: Infrastructure changes can affect decomp workflow quality gates even when they do not touch source matching code.
For `pull_request_target` workflows, be explicit about which Git ref is checked out because the default checkout behavior targets the base branch.
Small CI fixes should be evidence-backed with a successful run when possible.
naming_conventions: No C symbol, struct, or decomp naming conventions were changed in this PR.
The PR title directly names the GitHub Actions context variables involved: `github.ref` and `github.head_ref`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No assembly matching or code generation tactics were involved.
This was a repository CI/workflow maintenance change rather than a decompilation matching change.
review_feedback: No inline review comments or issue comments were present in the provided PR slice.
One review was recorded, but no specific review feedback text was included in the excerpt.
follow_up_queries: Find other GitHub Actions workflows using `pull_request_target` and `github.head_ref`.
Search for CI failures involving EditorConfig checkout refs.
Check whether other workflows rely on base-branch checkout behavior under `pull_request_target`.
